design_md:
# Stripe Visual Direction

## At a glance
Premium developer-first payments brand. Deep navy + indigo accents on white.

## Palette
- #635BFF indigo (accent)
- #0A2540 navy (ink)
- #FFFFFF white (surface)

## Typography
Sohne display, Camphor body. Tight tracking, generous whitespace.

## Mood
Confident, technical, minimal. Sharp grids, soft gradients on hero only.
